info.name: Didactio Backend
info.description: Single ordered runner flow for the Didactio backend. Set the collection variable `provider` to `openai` or `deepseek` before running the suite. Requests marked `AI GEN` invoke model generation directly. Requests marked `Advanced` are optional extra AI/debug helpers and are not part of the main happy-path runner. The flow is fully didactic-unit based.

exec: pm.test('Health payload exposes service status', function () { pm.expect(body.status).to.eql('ok'); pm.expect(body.service).to.eql('didactio-backend'); });
pm.test('Health payload exposes mongo state', function () { pm.expect(body.mongo).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(body.mongo.connected).to.be.a('boolean'); });
pm.test('Create Didactic Unit returns 201', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });

pm.test('Didactic unit is created already moderated', function () { pm.expect(body.id).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.status).to.eql('moderation_completed'); pm.expect(body.nextAction).to.eql('generate_questionnaire'); pm.expect(body.moderatedAt).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.studyProgress).to.be.an('object'); });
pm.test('Get Didactic Unit after create returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Didactic unit is already moderation completed', function () { pm.expect(body.status).to.eql('moderation_completed'); pm.expect(body.nextAction).to.eql('generate_questionnaire'); pm.expect(body.moderatedAt).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });

pm.test('Questionnaire is ready with core questions', function () { pm.expect(body.status).to.eql('questionnaire_ready'); pm.expect(body.nextAction).to.eql('answer_questionnaire'); pm.expect(body.questionnaire.questions).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(body.questionnaire.questions.length).to.be.at.least(5); });
pm.test('Generate Syllabus Prompt returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Generate Syllabus returns 200 or 409', function () { pm.expect([200, 409]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

pm.test('Generated syllabus is structurally valid', function () { pm.expect(body.status).to.eql('syllabus_ready'); pm.expect(body.nextAction).to.eql('review_syllabus'); pm.expect(body.syllabus).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(body.syllabus.title).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.syllabus.learningGoals).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; pm.expect(body.syllabus.chapters).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; });
pm.test('Syllabus generation returns a useful AI error', function () { pm.expect(body.error).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });

pm.test('Updated syllabus is stored before approval', function () { pm.expect(body.nextAction).to.eql('approve_syllabus'); pm.expect(body.syllabus.title).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.syllabus.chapters).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; });

pm.test('Syllabus approval advances the didactic unit lifecycle', function () { pm.expect(body.status).to.eql('syllabus_approved'); pm.expect(body.nextAction).to.eql('view_didactic_unit'); pm.expect(body.syllabusApprovedAt).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.id).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('didacticUnitId')); });
pm.test('List Didactic Units returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Didactic unit list returns dashboard summaries', function () { pm.expect(body.didacticUnits).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; const linkedUnit = body.didacticUnits.find((unit) => unit.id === pm.collectionVariables.get('didacticUnitId')); pm.expect(linkedUnit).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(linkedUnit.status).to.be.oneOf(['syllabus_approved', 'ready_for_content_generation', 'content_generation_in_progress', 'content_generation_completed']); pm.expect(linkedUnit.nextAction).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(linkedUnit.overview).to.be.a('string'); pm.expect(linkedUnit.chapterCount).to.be.a('number'); pm.expect(linkedUnit.generatedChapterCount).to.be.a('number'); pm.expect(linkedUnit.completedChapterCount).to.be.a('number'); pm.expect(linkedUnit.progressPercent).to.be.a('number'); pm.expect(linkedUnit.studyProgressPercent).to.be.a('number'); });
pm.test('Get Didactic Unit By Id returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Single didactic unit payload is complete', function () { pm.expect(body.id).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('didacticUnitId')); pm.expect(body.status).to.be.oneOf(['syllabus_approved', 'ready_for_content_generation', 'content_generation_in_progress', 'content_generation_completed']); pm.expect(body.nextAction).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.title).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.chapters).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(body.studyProgress).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(body.studyProgress.chapterCount).to.be.a('number'); pm.expect(body.studyProgress.completedChapterCount).to.be.a('number'); pm.expect(body.studyProgress.studyProgressPercent).to.be.a('number'); });

item.name: 10c AI GEN Generate Didactic Unit Chapter

exec: pm.test('Generate Didactic Unit Chapter returns 200 or 409', function () { pm.expect([200, 409]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

pm.test('Didactic unit chapter generation is structurally valid', function () { pm.expect(body.id).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('didacticUnitId')); pm.expect(body.status).to.be.oneOf(['content_generation_in_progress', 'content_generation_completed']); pm.expect(body.generatedChapters).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; pm.expect(body.chapterRevisions).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; const chapterIndex = Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('chapterIndex') || '0'); const chapter = body.generatedChapters.find((item) => item.chapterIndex === chapterIndex); const revision = body.chapterRevisions.find((item) => item.chapterIndex === chapterIndex); pm.expect(chapter).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(chapter.content).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(chapter.keyTakeaways).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; pm.expect(revision).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(revision.source).to.eql('ai_generation'); });
pm.test('Didactic unit chapter generation returns a useful AI error', function () { pm.expect(body.error).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });
pm.test('Get Didactic Unit Chapters returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Didactic unit chapter list exposes generation flags', function () { pm.expect(body.chapters).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; const chapter = body.chapters.find((item) => item.chapterIndex === Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('chapterIndex') || '0')); pm.expect(chapter).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(chapter.hasGeneratedContent).to.be.true; });

item.name: 10e Get Didactic Unit Chapter By Index

exec: pm.test('Get Didactic Unit Chapter returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Didactic unit generated chapter payload is complete', function () { pm.expect(body.chapterIndex).to.eql(Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('chapterIndex') || '0')); pm.expect(body.title).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.content).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.keyTakeaways).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; pm.expect(body.isCompleted).to.eql(false); });
pm.test('Complete Didactic Unit Chapter returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Didactic unit chapter completion updates study progress', function () { pm.expect(body.id).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('didacticUnitId')); pm.expect(body.completedChapters).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; const completion = body.completedChapters.find((item) => item.chapterIndex === Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('chapterIndex') || '0')); pm.expect(completion).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(completion.completedAt).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.studyProgress).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(body.studyProgress.completedChapterCount).to.be.at.least(1); pm.expect(body.studyProgress.studyProgressPercent).to.be.at.least(1); });
pm.test('Get Didactic Unit Runs returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Didactic unit runs include syllabus and chapter stages', function () { pm.expect(body.runs).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; const stages = body.runs.map((run) => run.stage); pm.expect(stages).to.include('syllabus'); pm.expect(stages).to.include('chapter'); const syllabusRun = body.runs.find((run) => run.stage === 'syllabus'); const latestChapterRun = body.runs.find((run) => run.stage === 'chapter'); pm.expect(syllabusRun.didacticUnitId).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('didacticUnitId')); pm.expect(latestChapterRun.didacticUnitId).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('didacticUnitId')); });
pm.test('Update Didactic Unit Chapter returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Didactic unit chapter update is stored', function () { pm.expect(body.title).to.eql('Edited Didactic Foundations'); pm.expect(body.updatedAt).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });
pm.test('Get Didactic Unit Chapter Revisions returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Didactic unit chapter revisions expose chapter history newest first', function () { pm.expect(body.revisions).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; const latestRevision = body.revisions[0]; pm.expect(latestRevision.chapterIndex).to.eql(Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('chapterIndex') || '0')); pm.expect(latestRevision.source).to.eql('manual_edit'); pm.expect(latestRevision.chapter).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(latestRevision.chapter.title).to.eql('Edited Didactic Foundations'); });

item.name: 97 Advanced AI GEN Regenerate Didactic Unit Chapter

exec: pm.test('Regenerate Didactic Unit Chapter returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Didactic unit chapter is regenerated', function () { pm.expect(body.id).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('didacticUnitId')); pm.expect(body.status).to.be.oneOf(['content_generation_in_progress', 'content_generation_completed']); pm.expect(body.generatedChapters).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; const regeneratedChapter = body.generatedChapters.find((chapter) => chapter.chapterIndex === Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('chapterIndex'))); pm.expect(regeneratedChapter).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(regeneratedChapter.content).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });

item.description: Advanced manual AI rerun for an already generated didactic-unit chapter. Keep this outside the main runner because it intentionally spends an extra provider call.

exec: pm.test('Create Didactic Unit (OpenAI) returns 201', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });

pm.test('OpenAI didactic unit is created', function () { pm.expect(body.provider).to.eql('openai'); pm.expect(body.id).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.status).to.eql('moderation_completed'); pm.expect(body.nextAction).to.eql('generate_questionnaire'); });
pm.test('Create Didactic Unit (DeepSeek) returns 201', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });

pm.test('DeepSeek didactic unit is created', function () { pm.expect(body.provider).to.eql('deepseek'); pm.expect(body.id).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.status).to.eql('moderation_completed'); pm.expect(body.nextAction).to.eql('generate_questionnaire'); });

variable.value: I want to build production-ready applications with Next.js
